subcodes.first_line: Straitened indeed is the field for the friends throughout all regions, and every shameless and unbridled one, devoid of honor, hath now become manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرصه بر ياران در جميع اقاليم تنگ است و هر بی نام و ننگ سرکش و بی پالهنک ديگر معلوم است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
